name: Elegant Southern Seafood Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion into 1/2-inch chunks and sauté in a frying pan with hot olive oil until soft, about 4 minutes.
2. Add chopped peppers and garlic; continue cooking until peppers are almost tender.
3. Peel shrimp and coarsely chop it along with the scallops and flounder.
4. Remove onion/pepper mixture from heat and add seafood, mayonnaise, and lime juice. Stir gently to prevent breaking up crab.
5. Season to taste with salt and white pepper.
6. Shape into patties and coat both sides with cornbread crumbs. (The patties can be placed on a plate and refrigerated for up to an hour.)
7. When ready to serve, heat clarified butter in a frying pan over moderately high heat. Sauté 3 cakes at a time until golden brown on both sides, about 2 minutes. Add more butter as necessary.
